feed.title: Code Swiftly
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Detect Keystrokes globally (macOS Keystroke logging)
entry.summary: Envirnoment: macOS: 12.2 Beta Xcode: 13.2.1 Prerequisites: Excerpt from Charles Srstka answer on Stackover Flow : Link 1) Your app needs to be code-signed. 2) Your app needs to not have the App Sandbox enabled, and: 3) Your app needs to be registered in the Security and Privacy preference pane, under Accessibility. Prompt for user’s permission: @discardableResult func acquir...

entry.title: How to code sign & publish an App to the App Store

link.title: How to code sign & publish an App to the App Store

entry.summary: Prerequisites Xcode compatible project(Using React-Native Project in this tutorial and Xcode 13.1). App Developer Account, Enroll for one if you dont have it. Before you submit your app for review make sure you check the App Store Review Guidelines. Steps The App submission process includes Register a new bundle identifier Create a CSR (Certificate Signing Request) Create an Ap...

entry.title: Xcode Static Analysis
entry.summary: Static Analysis Xcode provides a static analysis tool that can detect potential problems such as localized text, logical problems, memory problems, issues, and data syntax problems, etc. To perform static code analysis: Select -> Product > Analyze ( command + shift + B ) Enabling Analyze During ‘Build’ setting will allow you to start analyzing during compilation. Localization anal...

entry.title: Protocol oriented programming in Swift 5 - Basics

link.title: Protocol oriented programming in Swift 5 - Basics

entry.summary: Don’t start with a class, start with a protocol. – Apple About POP Apple introduced the POP concept in Swift 2.0 (WWDC 2015). Other programming languages such as Java, PHP use the keyword “interface”. What is a Protocol A protocol defines the method, property requirements that need to be implemented by conforming types i.e [Class, Structure and Enum]. The protocol only prov...

entry.title: Setup Jenkins to build iOS .IPA
entry.summary: Jenkins Installation Step 1: Install the Java environment before installing Jenkins. work@avadheshs-MacBook-Pro ~ % java -version java version "1.8.0_281" Java(TM) SE Runtime Environment (build 1.8.0_281-b09) Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM (build 25.281-b09, mixed mode) If it ain’t installed you would get an error (Unable to locate a Java Runtime). Download Link for Java: https://www.j...
